result.summary: Zoho.uk exposes Zoho Books API (HTTP), Zoho Books MCP, and Zoho Finance CLI; the HTTP API uses Zoho OAuth, while MCP auth is unclear from public docs.

zoho_oauth.label: Zoho OAuth access token
zoho_oauth.setup: Create a Zoho client in the Developer Console linked from the Zoho Books API docs, then authorize it against your Zoho account and organization. Use the resulting OAuth access token for API calls. Zoho’s UK Accounts portal is at [accounts.zoho.uk](https://accounts.zoho.uk/), but the developer docs point to the Zoho Books API docs for setup.

zoho_finance_cli_login.label: Zoho Finance CLI login session
zoho_finance_cli_login.setup: Install and sign in with the Zoho Finance CLI as described in the Zoho Books help page. The CLI login establishes the credentials used by the finance custom-functions tooling; the docs page is the setup entry point.
